mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window during easing periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal weakening labor demand and reduced consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real savings and loan balances indicate strong household liquidity and consumption capacity, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward correlation between RSAFS growth and 60-day returns falls below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding 105 reflects robust manufacturing output and capacity utilization, generating positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of instances when industrial production crosses the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price indices combined with high policy rates compress profit margins and discount future cash flows, producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields positive returns in >65% of triggered cases over a 3-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid payroll growth alongside low unemployment creates wage inflation pressures that force central banks to tighten, leading to negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the interaction term remains below 0.02 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.4 million units signals a broad demand contraction in construction and related sectors, dragging equity returns lower.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite weak housing data.

mechanism_narrative: Stagnant industrial production paired with rising inflation indicates supply-side bottlenecks that erode corporate earnings and trigger negative market returns.
failure_condition: The interaction signal fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.
